announcements.title: Family check-in tonight
announcements.body: Let's meet in the dashboard after dinner to plan the weekend and pick movie night snacks.
announcements.author: Paige

announcements.title: Gallery cleanup reminder
announcements.body: If you add a new memory card today, give it a warm caption so it feels like part of the scrapbook.
announcements.author: Dad

messages.author: Paige
messages.body: Don't forget to check the dinner vote before 4:30.

messages.author: Jerica
messages.body: I added a movie night idea to the request board.

messages.author: Dad
messages.body: Thanks for helping with the kitchen tonight. Gold stars are coming.

compliments.author: Paige
compliments.body: You kept showing up even when the day felt busy. Proud of you.

compliments.author: Dad
compliments.body: Your creativity makes this family brighter every single day.
